rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Dec Novr 1814 ad eundem diem revolution - 1815
rows.notes: Page title at top of sheet. Handwriting legible enough to read main words but several abbreviations and dates are cramped; no amounts on this line.
Section label beneath title. Text is fairly clear ('Arrearagia recepta'); no monetary figures associated on this line.
Section heading introducing fixed rents. Clear placement and no amounts on this line.
Right-hand alignment clearly shows '135' in the pounds column for this row. The description handwriting is moderately ambiguous (digits after name unclear), so text reading given with question marks.
Clear '136' in the pounds column aligned with this line. The place name spelling is uncertain from the script; amount alignment is unambiguous.
Small entry lower down with '10' appearing in the shillings column (no pounds). The word(s) at left are faint; alignment to shillings column is clear.
Section heading visible and centered/indenting like other headers. No amounts on this line.
Item listed under 'Land Tax Redeemed' but no amount immediately visible on the same line; likely a sub-item to the next line. Text is legible but amount absent.
Amount '4.19.' aligned to the right: interpreted as 4 pounds and 19 shillings. Pence column blank. Description is clear and aligns with this value.
Section heading for the following block of entries; text clear and no amount on this heading line.
Clear right-hand figures '171.11.' aligned with this line. Description and abbreviation 'P.T.D' legible; columns line up well.
Right-hand shows '42.9.4' with a small loop/mark after the pence that resembles a halfpenny sign ('ob'). Pounds and shillings alignment clear; pence fraction interpreted as 0.5.
Amount '10.4.11' is well aligned in the right columns. The place name is faint; '(Linkard)' added in parentheses to reflect the script's probable reading.
Right-hand value '9.11.' clearly visible. Description wording is clear and aligns with the amount.
Value '8.1.' visible in pounds and shillings columns. The place name reading is moderately clear; no pence shown.
Right-hand entry '44.2.' is legible. The place name is slightly uncertain but the amount columns are unambiguous.
Section heading for the following group of names ('Little Ten'). Text style matches other headings; no amount on this line.
Right-hand shows '28.7.11' aligned to this name. '3 Years' clear in the description; numbers pass validation.
Amount '13.15.6' clearly visible and columns are well-aligned. 'Do' (ditto) is legible in the description.
Right-hand '12.19.10' clear. Handwriting of the name is legible enough to read 'Atkins'; numbers conform to currency rules.
Amount '3.13.0' visible and aligns correctly. Name 'Hartley' readable; no pence shown.
Right-hand '24.3.10' clear. Name reading moderate but consistent with other 'Do' lines.
Value reads as '36.12.1' with a small appended loop after the '1' resembling a halfpenny mark; interpreted as 1½d (1 pence + 0.5). Shillings 12 valid; fraction read from the trailing loop.
Locality heading ('Lad Lane') above a short list of names. No amount on heading line.
Right-side '8.8.' clearly aligned with the name 'Conyers'. No pence shown; handwriting clear.
Value '6.0.' visible in pounds and shillings columns; name 'Wilson' clearly readable.
Amount '1.10.' visible and aligned. Surname appears as 'Pickford' (script clear).
Right-hand '6.0.' aligns with name that reads as 'Medenham' (slight ambiguity in vowel but entry clear).
Prominent summed line at right margin reading '613.19.1'. Alignment and digits are clear; treated as a subtotal/total for the block above.
New section heading about receipts of the present year. Text is centered and clear; no amount on the heading.
Sub-heading introducing bank receipts. Clear script; no amount on this exact line.
Right-hand shows '9.3.8' aligned to this entry. The left description is cramped and partly abbreviated ('Dividend or 1421.1.0'); amount reading is clear though handwriting around it is faint.
Second bank receipt line with '19.3.8' visible. 'Do Do' indicates repetition; numbers are legible though ink is slightly lighter than earlier entries.

Bottom-most total reads '38.7.4' as written on the page. Note: arithmetic of the two lines above (9.3.8 + 19.3.8 = 28.7.4) would suggest a subtotal of 28.7.4; the sheet actually shows '38.7.4' — transcription reflects the page but this mismatch lowers confidence.
